title: clerodendrum fortunei
intro: Clerodendrum fortunei, also known as the Glory Bower or Fortune's Glory Bower, is a flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its volatile oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Clerodendrum fortunei include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating rheumatism, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine formulas, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
